description_long: This is a modern, two-seater couch with a sleek, rectangular silhouette and clean lines. The upholstery appears to be a smooth, dark leather or leather-like material, giving it a sophisticated and urban look. The couch features two large seat cushions and two matching back cushions, both of which are slightly overstuffed for comfort. Two accent pillows are placed at each end, adding a touch of softness and visual interest. The armrests are straight and boxy, matching the overall geometric design, and the legs are short, block-style, and barely visible. The back of the couch is plain and unadorned, emphasizing its minimalist aesthetic.
description: A modern, dark leather two-seater couch with straight armrests, overstuffed cushions, and a minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing two seat cushions, two back cushions, and two accent pillows with straight armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the boxy armrest and the depth of the seat and back cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, unadorned back and the full width of the couch.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the armrest and cushion arrangement seen in view 1.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large seat cushions and two large back cushions, all loose and overstuffed, with two accent pillows placed at each end.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid, smooth leather or leather-like upholstery with no visible pattern, tufting, or decorative stitching.
attribute_leg_style: Short, block-style legs, likely wood or metal, minimally visible and finished in a dark color.
attribute_armrest_design: Straight, boxy armrests at each end, matching the height of the backrest and covered in the same upholstery.
attribute_backrest_type: Low, continuous backrest with two large, loose back cushions and no visible tufting or division.
